channel.title: Homelab on JavierBarbaran.com
channel.description: Recent content in Homelab on JavierBarbaran.com

item.title: I built a private AI personal trainer that runs on my home server
item.description: How I put together a self-hosted fitness assistant using Ollama, n8n, and Telegram — no subscriptions, no cloud, no data leaving my house.

item.title: Home server: A mini PC, Proxmox and way too much enthusiasm
item.description: How I set up my home server with a Beelink S12 Pro, why I chose Proxmox VE and what services I’m running on it.
